data.body:
## Description
Add infrastructure initialization steps to plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md (Phase 3 or new Phase) to pass all RED tests from task 1c9d-7a98. The implementation must add instructions for:

1. Install git pre-commit hooks (test gate: pre-commit-test-gate.sh, review gate: pre-commit-review-gate.sh) integrated with detected hook manager (Husky, pre-commit framework, or bare .git/hooks/). Use git rev-parse --git-common-dir to find correct hooks directory in worktrees/submodules.
2. Initialize ticket system: create orphan branch, set up .tickets-tracker/ directory. Verify push success and warn on failure.
3. Perform ticket smoke test: create and read a test ticket to verify system works.
4. Run generate-test-index.sh when tests are detected in the project.
5. Generate CLAUDE.md at HOST PROJECT root (not plugin CLAUDE.md) with project-specific defaults and ticket command references.
6. Copy KNOWN-ISSUES template to .claude/docs/ in host project.
7. Ask about CI trigger strategy — do NOT assume PR-based workflow.
8. (Jira bridge already covered by story 2f87-5437 — verify it's present, don't duplicate)

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 18.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
Depends on task 1c9d-7a98 (RED). After modification, all RED tests must pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] All RED tests from 1c9d-7a98 now pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -q 'FAILED: 0'
- [ ] SKILL.md references hook installation with manager detection
  Verify: grep -qi 'Husky' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'pre-commit-test-gate\|pre-commit-review-gate' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references ticket system initialization
  Verify: grep -qi 'orphan' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md && grep -qi 'tickets-tracker' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references CLAUDE.md generation with ticket commands
  Verify: grep -qi 'ticket.*command' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
